sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114703" key="xrhstomaqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρηστο-μᾰθέω</orth>, <sense id="n114703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be desirous of learning,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
